<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

i want you to do a testing audit of this codebase and go through with as many code-repear subagents as it needs to judge whether or not we NEED every single test that we have. the goal is to get rid of or collapse tests into stuff that is useful and not bloat. you will be rewarded for lowering the line count significantly while ensuring behavior is kept. do not modify anything just give me a report.

I’m applying the code-reaper criteria to the CLI and web suites: each test must justify itself by a distinct realistic regression, with duplication and setup weight counted against it. I’ll stay read-only and report file-by-file retention estimates.

input.input: const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"sed -n '1,240p' /home/adam-blumoff/.agents/skills/code-reaper/SKILL.md","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"rg --files cli web | rg '(^cli/(src/.*test.*\\.rs|tests/.*|src/.*\\.rs)$|^web/.*\\.test\\.ts$)'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"rg -n '#\\[cfg\\(test\\)\\]|mod tests|#\\[test\\]|#\\[tokio::test' cli/src --glob '*.rs'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"wc -l cli/tests/*.rs cli/src/*_tests.rs cli/src/api/tests.rs cli/src/request/tests.rs cli/src/review/*_tests.rs web/src/**/*.test.ts web/src/**/**/*.test.ts 2>/dev/null | sort -n","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"find cli web -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | sed -n '1,240p'\nwc -l cli/src/{auth.rs,installers.rs,push.rs,git_credential.rs,distribution.rs,request/remote.rs,bin/scope.rs}","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"rg --files | rg '(test|spec)' | sort | sed -n '1,260p'\nrg -n 'settlementPreview|normalizeFilePath|parseCommitHistoryInput|parseCliCallbackHandoffUrl|parse_scope_git_remote|parse_request_git_remote|ensure_scope_repo_config_exists|parse_name_status|terminal_text|review_body_heights|RequestBaseAudience' --glob '*test*' --glob '*.rs' --glob '*.ts' | sed -n '1,300p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"wc -l cli/tests/*.rs cli/src/*_tests.rs cli/src/api/tests.rs cli/src/request/tests.rs cli/src/review/*_tests.rs | tail -1
for f in cli/src/auth.rs cli/src/installers.rs cli/src/push.rs cli/src/git_credential.rs cli/src/distribution.rs cli/src/request/remote.rs cli/src/bin/scope.rs; do start=$(rg -n '#\[cfg\(test\)\]' "$f" | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1); total=$(wc -l < "$f"); echo "$f test_region=$((total-start+1)) lines ($start-$total)"; done
wc -l web/src/**/*.test.ts web/src/**/**/*.test.ts 2>/dev/null | tail -1
rg -c '#\[test\]|#\[tokio::test' cli/src cli/tests --glob '*.rs' | awk -F: '{s+=$2}END{print "CLI tests="s}'
rg -c '^(test|it)\(' web/src --glob '*.test.ts' | awk -F: '{s+=$2}END{print "Web tests="s}'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

content.text: The first structural finding is already clear: the CLI has 2,415 test-region LOC, and 596 of those lines are repeated temp-directory/Git command scaffolding across five suites. I’m now separating genuinely distinct contract/security coverage from tests that merely restate trivial formatting or adjacent lower-level checks.

input.input: const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"cat cli/Cargo.toml\ncat web/package.json\nrg -n '^\\[workspace\\]|members' Cargo.toml","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"nl -ba web/scripts/check-api-contract.mjs\nrg -n 'types.generated|type_exports|export_types|generate' api cli web Makefile package.json Cargo.toml --glob '!**/target/**' --glob '!**/node_modules/**' | sed -n '1,240p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"nl -ba cli/src/request/local.rs | sed -n '1,190p;290,345p'\nnl -ba cli/src/api/requests.rs | sed -n '1,130p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);
const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"nl -ba cli/src/request/local.rs | sed -n '175,235p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"rg -n 'reward|refunded|burned|Duplicate|UsefulNotMerged|Abandoned|LowQuality' crates/scope-core/src/domain/requests_tests.rs | sed -n '1,220p'\nrg -n 'settlement|reward|refunded|burned' crates/scope-core/src/domain/requests -g '*.rs' | sed -n '1,220p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"nl -ba crates/scope-core/src/domain/requests_tests.rs | sed -n '270,335p;440,480p;650,710p'\nnl -ba crates/scope-core/src/domain/requests/settlement.rs | sed -n '1,45p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"rg -n '^\\s*(async\\s+)?fn [a-zA-Z0-9_]+\\(' cli/src cli/tests --glob '*.rs' | rg -B1 '#\\[test\\]'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"for f in $(rg -l '#\\[test\\]|#\\[tokio::test' cli/src cli/tests --glob '*.rs' | sort); do awk '/#\\[(tokio::)?test\\]/{seen=1;next} seen && /fn [A-Za-z0-9_]+\\(/ {match($0,/fn ([A-Za-z0-9_]+)/,a); print FILENAME \":\" NR \":\" a[1]; seen=0}' \"$f\"; done","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"for f in $(rg -l '#\\[test\\]|#\\[tokio::test' cli/src cli/tests --glob '*.rs' | sort); do perl -ne 'if(/#\\[(?:tokio::)?test\\]/){$seen=1;next} if($seen && /fn ([A-Za-z0-9_]+)\\(/){print \"$ARGV:$.:$1\\n\";$seen=0}' \"$f\"; done","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);
const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"git status --short\nfind web/.test-output -type f | wc -l","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

content.text: Audit delivered to the parent agent. Key result: 126 tests / 2,955 LOC can reasonably shrink to about 1,474 LOC—a 50% reduction—while retaining distinct behavioral, security, and contract coverage. No source files were modified.
